scripts.ipad: cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace Inkwell.xcworkspace -scheme Inkwell -configuration Release -destination 'id=00008142-001839490C22401C' -derivedDataPath ./build -allowProvisioningUpdates -quiet build && xcrun devicectl device install app --device 00008142-001839490C22401C build/Build/Products/Release-iphoneos/Inkwell.app
scripts.ipad:dev: cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace Inkwell.xcworkspace -scheme Inkwell -configuration Debug -destination 'id=00008142-001839490C22401C' -derivedDataPath ./build -allowProvisioningUpdates -quiet build && xcrun devicectl device install app --device 00008142-001839490C22401C build/Build/Products/Debug-iphoneos/Inkwell.app
scripts.iphone: cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace Inkwell.xcworkspace -scheme Inkwell -configuration Release -destination 'id=00008150-000E4DC41E61401C' -derivedDataPath ./build -allowProvisioningUpdates -quiet build && xcrun devicectl device install app --device 00008150-000E4DC41E61401C build/Build/Products/Release-iphoneos/Inkwell.app
